name: Disable System Firewall
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Disable System Firewall
SIGMA Description: Detects disabling of system firewalls which could be used by adversaries to bypass controls that limit usage of the network.

False positives:
- Admin activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%service_stop%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%firewalld%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%iptables%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufw%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Disable System Firewall on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%service_stop%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%firewalld%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%iptables%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ufw%') AQL filter query
